title: Resolution
description: A BSA decision / written resolution — the Board's disposition of a case, issued as a written resolution. Today each resolution is published only as a linked PDF (/assets/bsa/downloads/pdf/decisions/<calendar>.pdf) reachable from the 'BSA Applications Status' dataset (yvxd-uipr) 'decisions_url'; the reasoning, conditions, and vote are locked in the document. This schema models the decision as a structured resource keyed on the calendar number.

calendar.description: BSA calendar number of the decided case ('calendar').

section.description: ZR / GCL section on which the Board acted ('section').

conditions.description: Conditions imposed on a grant (parsed from the resolution text; not in Open Data today).

term.description: Term of the grant, where applicable (e.g. a time-limited variance).
